title: Mattress Cleaning — Vibration Beater and HEPA Suction
content: Mattress cleaning combines high-frequency beater vibration (30–50 Hz) to dislodge dust mites and debris with HEPA-filtered suction (efficiency > 99.97% at 0.3 µm). UV-C irradiation (254 nm, 15–30 mW/cm²) kills dust mites and bacteria.
extended_content: Dust mite facts: 100–500 mites/g mattress dust; allergen Der p 1 protein > 10 µg/g triggers asthma. Beater mechanism: eccentric motor (3000 RPM) strikes cleaning head at 50 Hz; amplitude 2–5 mm. Suction motor: 600–1200 W brushless vacuum motor, 20–25 kPa gauge suction. HEPA filter: H13 class, captures 99.95% at 0.3 µm MPPS. UV-C dosage: 40 mJ/cm² kills 99.9% D. pteronyssinus (exposure time = dose/irradiance = 40/20 = 2 s/cm²). Forward speed: 0.05–0.1 m/s over mattress. Battery: 24 V 5 Ah Li-Ion, 30 min runtime. Weight: < 3 kg for portability.
formula: UV dose = irradiance × time ;  HEPA efficiency ≥ 99.97% at 0.3 µm
units: irradiance: mW/cm², dose: mJ/cm², suction: kPa
source: ISO 11135 Healthcare Product Sterilization; Platts-Mills, New Engl. J. Med. 1997; Dyson/Mite Controllers Cleaning Efficiency Studies
